comment: Howl — Death By Audio Total Sonic Annihilation-style self-oscillating feedback. A high-resonance bandpass in a feedback loop with a fuzz clipper; past unity loop gain it screams into sustained self-oscillation that the input whips up. NOT the literal external-loop router (a single ZDL has no access to the pedal's signal path) — it reproduces the sound, not the patch box. Desktop preview implements the full DSP; pedal C port is staged.
gid_comment: 0x02 = Filter category (resonant feedback filter). Avoids the Drive-browser-visibility quirk.
fxid_comment: 0x01CA. Above the repo's used range; distinct from the other customs. Verify uniqueness before flashing.

params.name: Annihil
params.comment: Feedback loop gain. Low = resonant filter; high = self-oscillating howl; max = chaos.

params.name: Drive
params.comment: Fuzz amount inside the loop — how torn/nasty the oscillation gets.

audio_nop_comment: Pedal C port starts as a UI-only smoke build; full DSP validated on desktop first.
